name: madfish-mcp-skills
description: Workflow skills for the Mad Fish MCP marketing-ops server. Each skill teaches an LLM to run real tasks against your connected ad and analytics platforms through the MCP's discovery meta-tools.

plugins.name: google-ads-skills
plugins.description: Google Ads campaign management via the Mad Fish MCP — audits, keyword research, campaign build, RSA copy, bidding, negatives, and reporting.
